chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Constitutional Petition No.D-667 of 2024 (Ubaidullah & others Vs. P.O Sindh & others) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE (S) Before; Adnan-ul-Karim Memon, J Amjad Ali Bohio, J Date of hearing and Order 26.08.2024 Mr. Kanji Mal Meghwar, advocate a/w petitioner. Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar Assistant A.G, Sindh. = O R D E R Adnan-ul-Karim Memon, J. Petitioners have approached this Court with the prayer that their services as Chowkidar, Naib Qasid, Mali/Attendant, and Sanitary Worker at Government Dispensary Gujri, Office of District Health Officer Sanghar, be regularized in terms that they have served the respondent Department for long and to halt/cancel the direct recruitment on the said posts, if any. 2. The learned counsel for the petitioners submits that the petitioners are already working voluntarily for the post advertised, to which they have also applied, and by way of this petition, they only require that they may be treated under their voluntary service already rendered and in this regard do any priority if available under law. 3. Learned AAG has submitted that no appointment has been made in BPS-1 to BPS-4 in Government Dispensary Gujri Das, Ranak Dahar, P.O Bhit Bhaiti, Taluka Khipro, and District Sanghar; however, submits that as and when the advertisement is made the petitioners will be considered as per their experience. The aforesaid stance is refuted by the petitioners that the advertisement was made on 17.06.2021 but that petitioners have not been considered. Be that as it may, it is for the respondents to consider the candidature of the petitioners under the law within reasonable time after hearing them, if they are entitled to be appointed regularly as they state that they are doing their job voluntarily. 4.

The aforesaid stance is refuted by the petitioners that the advertisement was made on 17.06.2021 but that petitioners have not been considered. Be that as it may, it is for the respondents to consider the candidature of the petitioners under the law within reasonable time after hearing them, if they are entitled to be appointed regularly as they state that they are doing their job voluntarily. 4. This petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE *Ali Sher*
